nl_query: Cerca dati relativi agli incidenti stradali avvenuti nel 2021 sul portale dati.gov.it.
Onde posso encontrar recursos relacionados aos acidentes de trânsito?
What is the total number of datasets whose titles refer to violence, considering different language spellings?

Visualizza tutti i pacchetti di dati nel sistema.
Vorrei consultare dataset sui rifiuti e la raccolta differenziata su dati.gov.it.
What is the total count of datasets from opendata.comune.palermo that have a specified issue date?
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale_con_issued) 
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset dct:issued ?issued .
}

nl_query: How many data resources are there concerning violence?
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?kw {
    "violence"@en
    "violence"@fr
    "violenza"@it
    "violencia"@es
    "violência"@pt
    "Gewalt"@de
    "violence"@nl
    "domestic violence"@en
    "gender-based violence"@en
    "violence against women"@en
    "femicide"@en
    "femicidio"@it
    "violenza domestica"@it
    "violencia de género"@es
    "violenza di genere"@it
  }
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dcat:keyword ?kw .
}

Can you list data services with API endpoints and their publishers, excluding WMS/WFS?
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?title ?endpointURL ?publisherName
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  OPTIONAL { ?service dct:publisher ?publisher . ?publisher foaf:name ?publisherName . }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/rest") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v1") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v2"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms") && !CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"))
}
ORDER BY ?title
LIMIT 30

original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?dataset ?created ?publisher
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:publisher ?publisher .
  ?publisher foaf:name ?nome .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?nome)), "palermo"))
}
LIMIT 5

nl_query: Potresti cercare dataset relativi ai civici a Palermo?
Quanti comuni sono titolari di diritti su dataset?
original_query:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?rightsholderName) AS ?numComuni)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Comune di") || STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Città di"))
}

Quali sono i 50 comuni che detengono il maggior numero di dataset?
original_query:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?rightsholderName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?numDataset)
WHERE {
  ?dataset dct:rightsHolder ?rightsholder .
  ?rightsholder foaf:name ?rightsholderName .
  FILTER (STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Comune di") || STRSTARTS(?rightsholderName, "Città di"))
}
GROUP BY ?rightsholderName
ORDER BY DESC(?numDataset)
LIMIT 50

Provide the monthly count of datasets published by opendata.comune.palermo between 2025 and 2026, inclusive.
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?issued) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?issued) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dataset), "opendata.comune.palermo"))
  ?dataset dct:issued ?issued .
  FILTER(?issued >= "2025-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime)
  FILTER(?issued < "2027-01-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
GROUP BY (YEAR(?issued)) (MONTH(?issued))
ORDER BY ?anno ?mese

nl_query: Can you list the publishers containing "comune" in their name that have published at least one dataset subject to EU regulation 2023/138, ordered by the number of such datasets?
original_query:
SELECT ?name (COUNT(?ds) AS ?n)
WHERE {
  ?ds <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/applicableLegislation> <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj> .
  ?ds <http://purl.org/dc/terms/publisher> ?pub .
  ?pub <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name> ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), "comune"))
}
GROUP BY ?name
HAVING (COUNT(?ds) >= 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?n)
LIMIT 300

How is the data repository at repository.data.gov.gr performing?
Can you list the harvest endpoints and English dataset titles from the data-gov-gr catalogue?
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX edp: <https://europeandataportal.eu/voc#>

SELECT ?harvestEndpoint ?datasetURI ?title
WHERE {
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> edp:harvestEndpoint ?harvestEndpoint .
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> dcat:dataset ?datasetURI .
  ?datasetURI dcterms:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en" || LANG(?title) = "el" || LANG(?title) = "")
}
LIMIT 5
